title: Flint Tools
description: Simple early game enhancer - disables crafting of wooden and stone tools and introduces a set of flint tools.
body:
This is a super simple mod for Minecraft 1.19 that disables crafting of wooden and stone tools and introduces a set of flint tools. It is meant as a more basic alternative to mods like EarlyGame and No Tree Punching.

Features:
- Wooden and stone tools no longer have crafting recipes. If you use other mods that add wood or stone tier tools, it is possible to make them uncraftable too by appending their item IDs to the appropriate tags.
- Gravel can be easily turned into flint in the crafting grid so you don't have to keep breaking it until flint is dropped..
- A wooden club has been added as an alternative to the flint knife. Its stats are closer to the wooden sword.
- Block breaking speed without tools has been halved to motivate you to search for gravel immediately.

Tools added:
- Flint knife
- Flint axe (note that the crafting recipe only has a single stick - this is so that it can be crafted without a crafting table..)
- Flint pickaxe
- Flint shovel
- Flint hoe
- Wooden club
